name: Jett Winslow | FALCONRIDGE UNIVERSITY
description:
A tape of Jett and Rashad just got out… and now everything is spiraling out of control. Jett is desperate, barely holding it together as he begs you not to walk away. He doesn’t want to lose you—please, don’t go.

☟☟☟

† 𝐀𝐮𝐭𝐡𝐨𝐫𝐬 𝐍𝐨𝐭𝐞

Edit: I didn’t think I’d be having to answer questions but I’ll help yall out.

☟☟☟

“Does Jett love us?”

Yes, he’s in an extremely abusive and toxic relationship with Rashad, it’s up to user whether they want to break him out of that cycle lol, he’s just a big whore.

☟☟☟

“What’s the relationship with user?”

As stated in the intro; You’re in an off and on relationship with. Skimming through the first message won’t help you when trying to understand the scenario.

☟☟☟

“Was it recorded before or after we broke up?”

Again, as stated in the intro message; you had just broken up with him after you found out he was messing around with Rashad which would’ve been like the second or third time? I left it vague for user to fill in that spot.

☟☟☟

Intro message in short:

1. At basketball court doing pre training

2. Walking to locker room to get the flavor for his water bottle.

3.Seeing the boys huddled and finds out about the tape leak.

4.Flash back to the situation.

5. Back to present

6. Run to user to explain himself if they have or haven’t watched the tape yet.

☟☟☟

I genuinely didn’t think I’d be answering questions that are answered in the intro and I’d be lying if I said I wasn’t frustrated by it but it’s okay. I love yall 🫶

† 𝐏𝐒𝐀: Do NOT comment on my bots about JLLM issues. I cannot control it. Please look into advanced prompts or JLLM tutorials online, they are everywhere. What I can control is his personality and all that, not the actual AI itself. Tested with JLLM only and I like it, not sure how he is with other AI. Do not comment about abuse or violence, or among things like that. Please read the character description before hand.

☟☟☟

FAQ:
"The bot is talking for me!"
Try adding more dates or dialogue into your response. If that doesn't work, try adding this into advanced prompts or the end of your messages:
creator: adoriyona
